name: Shrimp Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl until well blended.
2. Form the mixture into patties, each about 1/4 cup and 1 inch thick.
3. Dip each patty into beaten eggs, then coat with additional bread crumbs.
4. Heat oil for frying to 350°F (175°C).
5. Fry the shrimp cakes in batches until golden brown and crispy, approximately 3 minutes per side.
6. Serve garnished with lemon wedges.
